pathways.name: Swift Language Debut Path
pathways.description: Learn Apple's brand new programming language from the ground up. Start with the fundamentals (var/let, optionals, type inference), advance to memory management, generics, and pattern matching, then learn how Swift coexists with your existing Objective-C codebase.

pathways.name: App Extensions Adoption Path
pathways.description: Adopt iOS 8's six new extension points: Today widgets, Share, Action, Photo Editing, Document Provider, Custom Keyboard. Master the lifecycle, the data sharing model, embedded frameworks, and the JavaScript bridge for Safari action extensions.

pathways.name: HealthKit Integration Path
pathways.description: Adopt HealthKit for centralized health and fitness data. Learn the model objects, characteristic vs sample types, the read-only-model + change-request pattern, queries, statistics, and per-type privacy permissions.

pathways.name: HomeKit Foundation Path
pathways.description: Build the first generation of Apple-ecosystem smart-home apps. Cover the home/room/accessory/service/characteristic hierarchy, Siri integration, action sets, timer triggers, the HomeKit Accessory Simulator, and end-to-end encryption.

pathways.name: CloudKit Adoption Path
pathways.description: Adopt Apple's new BaaS for Apple-only apps. Learn containers, public vs private databases, records, references, assets, queries, subscriptions, the operation API, and how to handle conflicts and notification coalescing.

pathways.name: Metal Graphics Path
pathways.description: Adopt Apple's new low-overhead GPU API for 10x more draw calls per frame on A7+. Cover the architecture, command buffers and encoders, render pipelines, the shading language, and async multi-threaded encoding.

pathways.name: Adaptive UI / Size Classes Path
pathways.description: Build one universal app that adapts to iPhone, iPad, every orientation, and every device size. Learn trait collections, size classes, the new UIPresentationController architecture, adaptive segues, and the resizable simulator.

pathways.name: Continuity & Handoff Path
pathways.description: Make activities flow seamlessly between Apple devices. Adopt NSUserActivity, AppKit/UIKit responder integration, native-to-web handoff via apple-app-site-association, shared web credentials, and continuation streams.

pathways.name: PhotoKit Migration Path
pathways.description: Migrate from the deprecated ALAssetsLibrary to PhotoKit. Read-only model objects, change-request mutations, the change-observer pattern, PHCachingImageManager for grid scrolling, non-destructive editing, and Photo Editing Extensions.

pathways.name: Touch ID Integration Path
pathways.description: Add Touch ID authentication to your app. Choose between Keychain ACLs (Secure Enclave-backed) and the new LocalAuthentication framework. Master the WhenPasscodeSet accessibility class and biometric fallbacks.

pathways.name: iOS 8 Modernization Path
pathways.description: Catch your existing iOS 7 app up to iOS 8: adaptive size classes, presentation controller architecture, self-sizing cells with Dynamic Type, new privacy permissions, embedded frameworks, and the new push notifications model.

pathways.name: Yosemite UI Adoption Path
pathways.description: Update your Mac app for Yosemite's flat design and Vibrancy. NSVisualEffectView, NSAppearance, full-size content views, transparent title bars, storyboards on macOS, and adaptive system colors.

pathways.name: Modern SpriteKit & SceneKit Path
pathways.description: Build games with Apple's high-level frameworks. SpriteKit gains shaders, lighting, per-pixel physics, IK, and physics fields. SceneKit ships on iOS for the first time, with full Metal backing on A7+.

pathways.name: Energy & Modern Networking Path
pathways.description: Adopt the new background networking model with NSURLSession (transparent SPDY), use NSBackgroundActivityScheduler on Mac for energy-aware deferred work, request granular Location permissions, and audit your app for energy use.
